title: Samsung Galaxy A27 vs. Galaxy A37
description: We only recently finished reviewing the Galaxy A27. It had a pretty delayed launch compared to the rest of its Galaxy A family siblings, like the Galaxy A37, which came out all the way back in April. That's just one of the explanations for the pricing faux pas the Galaxy A27 finds itself in. In the US, Samsung technically launched the A27 at $350, while running a promo for the A37 at $330 at the same time. That was quickly corrected with the A37 getting back its old price - $450, which coincidentally is exactly how much the Galaxy A57 costs at the moment. Things aren't much different...

title: Deals: Nothing Phone (4b) goes on pre-order, Galaxy A57 and Realme 16 Pro+ stand in its way
description: Nothing unveiled the Nothing Phone (4b) earlier this week – this is the first (b) series phone, but it’s a mid-ranger not unlike the (a) series models. In fact, the (4a) is the better phone. The Nothing Phone (4b) has a 6.77” 1080p+ OLED display, a Snapdragon 6 Gen 4 chipset and a 5,200mAh battery with 33W charging (for Europe, India is getting a version with a larger 6,000mAh battery). The 50MP main camera has a tiny sensor (1/2.76”) and is joined only by an 8MP ultra-wide camera – even the CMF Phone 2 Pro had a telephoto lens (but the CMF Phone 3 Pro got canceled). The (4b) is currently...

title: Samsung's Galaxy XR headset finally lands in the UK
description: After initially launching in Korea and the US, Samsung's Galaxy XR headset is now finally available in the UK as well, from Samsung’s online store. It's been up for pre-order over there since mid-June. You can buy one for a recommended retail price of £1,699. For a limited time (that isn't actually specified in the official press release), buying it will also get you an "Explorer Pack" which Samsung says is worth £665. This contains 12 months of Google AI Pro, YouTube Premium, Google Play Pass, Calm Premium, and Project Pulsar by Adobe, as well as NFL PRO ERA and the Asteroid...

title: Lenovo shows the Legion Y700 Ultimate gaming tablet in a video
description: Earlier this month, Lenovo started teasing a new Legion gaming tablet with 5G support, revealing that its full announcement will take place in August. Today, the brand has showcased the device in the video you can see below. The tablet now seems to be called Legion Y700 Ultimate, but this is also machine translated from Chinese so accuracy is not guaranteed. The tablet comes with a physical SIM slot and an eSIM, supporting dual-SIM dual-standby between the two of them. The design has also changed slightly compared to the Y700 (Gen 5) tablet, which arrived in March without 5G...

title: Tecno Camon 50 Ultra's India launch date announced
description: The Tecno Camon 50 Ultra, unveiled in March, will make its debut in India on July 17. Tecno is advertising the Camon 50 Ultra in India as a smartphone "designed for creators, storytellers, and photography enthusiasts." The brand also says that Camon 50 Ultra is "built to capture life's best moments as they happen." Tecno hasn't revealed the Camon 50 Ultra's pricing and availability for India yet, so we'll have to wait till next Friday for that. However, if you want to know more about the Tecno Camon 50 Ultra, you can read our detailed review here. Its key specs include the Dimensity...

title: European Commission says Instagram and Facebook's addictive design breaches the Digital Services Act
description: Today, the European Commission (EC) has announced that it has preliminarily found Meta in breach of the EU's Digital Services Act for what it calls "the addictive design of Instagram and Facebook". Specifically, its investigation focuses on features like infinite scroll, autoplay, push notifications, and the services' "highly personalized recommender systems". The EC's investigation indicates that Meta "did not adequately assess the risks of its addictive design on the physical and mental wellbeing of users, including minors and vulnerable adults". Highly personalized recommendations,...

title: Verizon will provide 5G connectivity services for new BMW vehicles in the US
description: KDDI, which is a company that provides IoT services and connected experiences to its OEM partners, has a partnership with BMW Group. KDDI, on the other hand, also has a long-standing relationship with Verizon, which in turn provides 5G and LTE connectivity. That's why Verizon just made its partnership with BMW Group and KDDI official. The newly formed partnership means that Verizon provides its 5G Standalone Connected Vehicles services to BMW, so all new BMW vehicles produced for the US markets will make use of Verizon's cellular network. The press release doesn't explicitly say which...

title: iPhone Ultra battery capacity leaks
description: According to Digital Chat Station on Weibo, one of Apple's usual battery suppliers just had a pair of batteries certified together, which means they are intended for a foldable smartphone (since these have split batteries due to the form factor). The batteries in question have a rated capacity of 1,921 mAh and 2,962 mAh, respectively, giving us a grand total of 4,883 mAh. This is rated capacity, which means the typical advertised capacity will be 5,000 mAh. So that's most likely what the iPhone Ultra will boast. iPhone Ultra speculative render Interestingly, it's on par with the...

title: Netflix is once again offering free trials
description: Netflix is once again offering free trials. These vary in length from 7 to 30 days, depending on user and not necessarily location. Even so, if you try visiting in an incognito browser window or clearing cookies beforehand, you may get offered the full 30 days. The offer weirdly seems to exclude the US and UK for whatever reason. For a lot of users, the trial makes you select which plan you want - and that will of course be automatically charged at the end of the trial period. Thus, you can even opt for the most expensive Premium plan, which includes 4K HDR streaming. It's unclear...

title: Samsung’s Galaxy Z Fold8, Fold8 Ultra and Flip8 emerge ahead of launch
description: Samsung’s highly anticipated trio of foldables has emerged ahead of launch in their home market of South Korea. A Reddit user posted an image which showcases the Fold8 front and center, surrounded by the Z Flip8 on the left and Z Fold8 Ultra on the right. He claims the devices were lined up at a Samsung retail store in South Korea, with alleged confirmation that these are indeed the unreleased foldables given by an on-site store employee. Alleged Samsung Galaxy Fold8 alongside Z Flip8 and Z Fold8 Ultra This is our first look at the Fold8 in its semi-unfolded state. And it appears...

title: Nvidia launches GeForce Trading Cards to get gamers to love it again
description: If you're a gamer, Nvidia would like you to know that it still cares about you despite the fact that it's been a bit busy with AI stuff these past few years. To that effect, the company has now announced the GeForce Trading Cards Series 1, which feature "some of GeForce PC gaming's great moments". See? It hasn't forgotten about gaming, even though it's probably only going to launch new GPUs for gamers next year. While you wait, you can grab the GeForce Trading Cards, which are free and have 14 possible designs, featuring the likes of the NV1, GeForce 256, GeForce 3, GeForce 7800 GTX,...

title: Here's what to expect from the next Huawei MateBook Fold
description: Last May, Huawei launched the MateBook Fold, a laptop with a foldable screen. The company is now working on its successor, which seems to be a mild refresh coming in the second half of this year. According to a new leak from Digital Chat Station on Weibo, the new MateBook Fold will be offered in Streaming Gold, Sky White, and Phantom Black, in three RAM/storage configurations: 24GB/512GB, 24GB/1TB, and 32GB/2TB. It will allegedly be powered by a Kirin X9 series chipset, and Huawei has intriguingly focused on cost reduction for this sequel. Whether that means it will actually be...

title: Honor Watch 6 Plus Motorcycle Edition unveiled
description: The Honor Watch 6 Plus - unveiled in May - comes in five colors, which are now joined by a Motorcycle Edition aimed at bike and racing enthusiasts. Honor collaborated with Zhang Xue - a Chinese professional racer and founder of motorcycle brand ZXMOTO - on the Watch 6 Plus Motorcycle Edition. And while the Watch 6 Plus Motorcycle Edition's specs and features are identical to those of the standard model, the design is different. Additionally, the Honor Watch 6 Plus Motorcycle Edition comes with a boot animation with the ZXMOTO logo, an overspeed warning feature to ensure safe...

title: Motorola Edge 70 Max launch date and key specs revealed
description: Leaked renders recently gave us a good look at the Motorola Edge 70 Max. Now, Motorola has officially revealed the phone's design, confirmed a few key specs, and announced its India launch date. Motorola has confirmed that the Edge 70 Max will launch in India on July 15. The smartphone will be offered in light green and light blue color options. Alongside announcing the launch date, the company also confirmed that the handset will be powered by the Snapdragon 8 Gen 5 chipset. The Edge 70 Max will feature a quad-HD display with a peak brightness of 7,000 nits. The teasers also...

title: Motorola Edge 70 Pro review
Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 and Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra's US pricing leaks
description: Recent leaks have already given us an idea of how much Samsung's upcoming Galaxy Z foldables could cost in Europe and South Korea. Now, a fresh report has revealed the US pricing of the wide Galaxy Z Fold8 and the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra. According to the report, which cites industry sources, the wide-screen Galaxy Z Fold8 with 256GB of storage will be priced at $1,899 in the US. Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 leaked render Meanwhile, the more premium Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra is said to cost $100 more than the Galaxy Z Fold7, the model it is expected to succeed. The Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra will...

title: The vivo T5 Lite with a 6,500mAh battery will debut next week
description: vivo recently teased the arrival of the T5 Lite in India, and the company has now confirmed when the smartphone will be unveiled. In a post on X, vivo confirmed that the T5 Lite will be arriving in India on July 16. The accompanying teaser video also reveals that the smartphone will be available in blue and silver color options. The wait ends soon, and the Turbo experience begins.​Meet the vivo T5 Lite 44W on 16th July 2026.​#vivoT5Lite #GetSetTurbo pic.twitter.com/KLFKwqehej— vivo India (@Vivo_India) July 10, 2026 The T5 Lite is also confirmed to get a 120Hz display with up...

title: Samsung Galaxy Tab S12+ appears in a live image
description: This year, Samsung is launching the Galaxy Tab S12+ and the Galaxy Tab S12 Ultra. The two tablets are expected to be unveiled alongside the Galaxy S26 FE, possibly in early September. A new Galaxy Tab Ultra is being released each year, while the vanilla and Plus models alternate years. So in 2025 we got the Galaxy Tab S11, and this year we'll have the S12+. Now, the Galaxy Tab S12+ has been certified by Safety Korea, and this process has resulted in the image you can see below, showing the tablet from the front, becoming public. The tablet has the model numbers SM-X840 and SM-X846N...

title: Redmi Note 17 to sport a 7-inch OLED display, more details revealed
description: With the launch of the Redmi Note 17 lineup in China drawing closer, new details about the upcoming devices have been confirmed by the company. The latest reveals the battery capacity and display size of the standard Redmi Note 17, while also showcasing the phone in a new color option. Across multiple Weibo posts, Redmi has confirmed that the standard Note 17 will feature a large 7-inch OLED display. The panel will support a refresh rate of 120Hz, up to 1,200 nits of global brightness, and offer several eye protection features. Redmi has also confirmed that the Note 17 will pack...

title: New Motorola Edge 70 Max leaked renders reveal its main specs
description: Back in June we saw the upcoming Motorola Edge 70 Max in some leaked renders, and then, a few days ago, the company itself started teasing the handset in India. Now we have a couple more renders that have been leaked, and one of them conveniently shows some of the phone's key specs. As you can see, the Edge 70 Max will have a 7,100 mAh battery and a 6.82-inch "Extreme AMOLED" screen. New Motorola Edge 70 Max leaked renders It will be powered by the Snapdragon 8 Gen 5 SoC. The phone is also going to have magnetic wireless charging, which is still a very rare feature in the...
